files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.SerialDeviceController
files.Summary: Abstract base class for controlling serial devices. Provides methods for connecting, disconnecting, and sending packets over COM ports. Works only on Windows (Standalone or Editor).

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.ForceAngle4Converter_DeviceV0Factory
files.Summary: Factory for creating ForceAngle4Converter_DeviceV0 instances. Converts force vectors to 4-motor angle values for V0 devices.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.ForceAngle4NewConverter_DeviceV0Factory
files.Summary: Alternative factory for creating ForceAngle4Converter_DeviceV0 instances with modified conversion logic. Uses a different force-to-angle calculation method compared to the standard converter.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.HapticAudioOutputV0
files.Summary: Haptic audio output component for V0 devices. Filters and distributes audio values to the audio manager.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.HapticDeviceV0
files.Summary: Main Haptic Device class managing both force and audio outputs. Handles serial communication and audio routing for left and right hands.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.HapticForceOutputV0
files.Summary: Haptic force output component for V0 devices. Converts and filters force values for a specific humanoid body part.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.SerialDeviceV0Controller
files.Summary: Concrete serial controller for V0 devices. Manages COM ports, builds angle packets, and sends them.

files.Title: Commissure.HapticsSystem.Device.V0.SerialDeviceV0Manager
files.Summary: ScriptableObject manager for V0 serial device communication. Handles initialization and forwarding angle data to the controller.
